candidates.why: A separate operating-line 'Depreciation' appears above Operating profit at the same level as the selected COGS rows ('Vessel operating expenses' and 'Voyage expenses and commission'), so it does not appear embedded within those selected rows. For a shipping company, this standalone depreciation line most plausibly relates to vessel/operating assets and should be added separately to the COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Selected the standalone operating depreciation line for COGS_DA because it sits outside the already selected COGS rows and no more specific COGS depreciation component is shown.

candidates.why: Although 'Depreciation' is a separate operating-line item, there is no indication it is SG&A-specific or tied to 'General and administrative expenses'. In this shipping-company layout, the generic depreciation line is more likely vessel/operating depreciation than G&A depreciation. To avoid double counting or misallocation, do not add it to XSGA_DA.

variables.notes: No separate SG&A-specific depreciation/amortisation row is visible. The standalone 'Depreciation' line is more appropriately treated as COGS-related in this statement format, so nothing should be added separately to XSGA_COMPONENTS.
